member.name: T:CSharpSpeedRush.App
member.summary: The entry point of the WPF application. WPF automatically looks for this class and calls its constructor which in turn opens the StartupUri window (MainWindow).
App

member.name: M:CSharpSpeedRush.App.InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent

member.name: M:CSharpSpeedRush.App.Main
member.summary: Application Entry Point.

member.name: T:CSharpSpeedRush.Logic.RaceManager
member.summary: Central game controller. Holds car, track, time, and turn state. Processes player actions and updates state. UI calls this layer only.

member.name: F:CSharpSpeedRush.Logic.RaceManager.StartingTime
member.summary: How many time units the player starts with.

member.name: F:CSharpSpeedRush.Logic.RaceManager.TimeForSpeedUp
member.summary: Time cost per turn when speeding up.

member.name: F:CSharpSpeedRush.Logic.RaceManager.TimeForMaintain
member.summary: Time cost per turn when maintaining speed.

member.name: F:CSharpSpeedRush.Logic.RaceManager.TimeForPitStop
member.summary: Time cost per turn for a pit stop (slower, but you get fuel).

member.name: F:CSharpSpeedRush.Logic.RaceManager.PitStopFuelAmount
member.summary: How much fuel a pit stop adds to the tank.

member.name: F:CSharpSpeedRush.Logic.RaceManager.SpeedUpMultiplier
member.summary: Speed multiplier when the player chooses "Speed Up".

member.name: F:CSharpSpeedRush.Logic.RaceManager.MaintainMultiplier
member.summary: Speed multiplier when the player chooses "Maintain Speed".

member.name: P:CSharpSpeedRush.Logic.RaceManager.SelectedCar
member.summary: The car the player selected before the race.

member.name: P:CSharpSpeedRush.Logic.RaceManager.RaceTrack
member.summary: The track the race is being run on.

member.name: P:CSharpSpeedRush.Logic.RaceManager.TimeRemaining
member.summary: Time units remaining. Counts down each turn.

member.name: P:CSharpSpeedRush.Logic.RaceManager.CurrentTurn
member.summary: Which turn we are on (1, 2, 3 ...).

member.name: P:CSharpSpeedRush.Logic.RaceManager.Status
member.summary: Current race status (InProgress, Finished, etc.).

member.name: P:CSharpSpeedRush.Logic.RaceManager.TurnHistory
member.summary: Queue of TurnResult structs. FIFO order for turn history.

member.name: P:CSharpSpeedRush.Logic.RaceManager.AvailableCars
member.summary: Available cars for selection. List allows ordered display and index lookup.

member.name: M:CSharpSpeedRush.Logic.RaceManager.#ctor
member.summary: Sets up the RaceManager and populates the list of available cars. Call StartRace() after the player picks a car to begin.

member.name: M:CSharpSpeedRush.Logic.RaceManager.StartRace(CSharpSpeedRush.Models.Car)
member.summary: Starts the race with the car the player chose. Resets all state so the player can restart without creating a new manager.
member.param: The car the player selected from AvailableCars.
member.exception: Thrown if no car is provided.

member.name: M:CSharpSpeedRush.Logic.RaceManager.ProcessTurn(CSharpSpeedRush.Models.PlayerAction)
member.summary: Processes one turn of the game based on the player's chosen action. This is the core game loop step – called every time the player clicks a button.
member.param: What the player wants to do this turn.
member.returns: A TurnResult struct describing what happened.
member.exception: Thrown if the race is not in progress.

member.name: M:CSharpSpeedRush.Logic.RaceManager.UpdateRaceStatus
member.summary: Checks all end conditions after every turn. Updates Status so the UI knows whether to show game-over screens.

member.name: T:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.Car
member.summary: Represents a racing car with speed, fuel consumption, and tank capacity.

member.name: P:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.Car.Name
member.summary: The display name of the car (e.g. "Rocket Racer").

member.name: P:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.Car.SpeedPerTurn
member.summary: How many distance units this car covers each turn when going at full speed. Higher = faster, but burns more fuel.

member.name: P:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.Car.FuelConsumptionPerTurn
member.summary: How many fuel units this car burns each turn at full speed. Lower = more efficient.

member.name: P:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.Car.FuelCapacity
member.summary: The maximum amount of fuel this car can hold. Larger tank = fewer pit stops needed.

member.name: P:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.Car.CurrentFuel
member.summary: Current fuel level. Starts full.

member.name: M:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.Car.#ctor(System.String,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Creates a new car with the given stats and starts it with a full tank.
member.param: Distance covered per turn at full speed.
Fuel burned per turn at full speed.
Maximum fuel the tank can hold.

member.name: M:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.Car.BurnFuel(System.Double)
member.summary: Burns fuel based on the speed multiplier the player chose. For example, a multiplier of 0.5 = half speed = half fuel used.
member.param: A value between 0 and 1 representing speed level.
member.exception: Thrown when there is not enough fuel to drive.

member.name: M:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.Car.Refuel(System.Double)
member.summary: Refuels the car during a pit stop. Adds a fixed amount of fuel. Cannot exceed the tank's maximum capacity.
member.param: How many fuel units to add.

member.name: P:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.Car.FuelPercentage
member.summary: Returns the fuel level as a percentage (0–100) so we can show it on a progress bar.

member.name: M:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.Car.ToString
member.summary: Returns a friendly string showing the car's key stats. Used in the car selection screen.

member.name: T:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.PlayerAction
member.summary: The three actions a player can take on their turn.

member.name: F:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.PlayerAction.SpeedUp
member.summary: Go faster – uses more fuel but covers more distance.

member.name: F:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.PlayerAction.MaintainSpeed
member.summary: Keep the current pace – balanced fuel and distance.

member.name: F:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.PlayerAction.PitStop
member.summary: Pull into the pit lane to refuel – no distance gained this turn.

member.name: T:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.RaceStatus
member.summary: Tracks whether the race is still going or has finished (and why). The UI uses this to decide what message to show the player.

member.name: F:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.RaceStatus.NotStarted
member.summary: Race has not started yet.

member.name: F:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.RaceStatus.InProgress
member.summary: Race is currently in progress.

member.name: F:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.RaceStatus.Finished
member.summary: Player finished all laps successfully.

member.name: F:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.RaceStatus.OutOfFuel
member.summary: Car ran out of fuel before finishing – game over.

member.name: F:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.RaceStatus.TimeUp
member.summary: Clock ran out before all laps were completed – game over.

member.name: T:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.TurnResult
member.summary: A snapshot of everything that happened during one game turn. Stored in the turn history queue so the player can review their race.

member.name: F:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.TurnResult.TurnNumber
member.summary: Which turn number this was (1, 2, 3 ...).

member.name: F:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.TurnResult.Action
member.summary: What action the player chose on this turn.

member.name: F:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.TurnResult.DistanceCovered
member.summary: How far the car moved this turn (in distance units).

member.name: F:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.TurnResult.FuelBurned
member.summary: How much fuel was burned this turn.

member.name: F:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.TurnResult.LapAfterTurn
member.summary: What lap the car was on after this turn.

member.name: F:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.TurnResult.Message
member.summary: A human-friendly summary of this turn's events.

member.name: T:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.Track
member.summary: Represents the race track. Tracks distance driven and lap count.

member.name: F:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.Track.LapDistance
member.summary: The length of one lap in distance units. The player must accumulate this much distance to finish a lap.

member.name: P:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.Track.TotalLaps
member.summary: Total number of laps in this race (always 5 as per the spec).

member.name: P:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.Track.CurrentLap
member.summary: Which lap the player is currently on (starts at 1).

member.name: P:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.Track.DistanceInCurrentLap
member.summary: How far the car has travelled within the current lap (0–100). Once this reaches 100, a new lap begins.

member.name: P:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.Track.IsRaceComplete
member.summary: True when the player has finished all laps.

member.name: M:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.Track.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a track with the specified number of laps.
member.param: How many laps the race has. Defaults to 5.

member.name: M:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.Track.AdvanceDistance(System.Double)
member.summary: Moves the car forward by the given distance. Automatically completes laps when 100 units are reached.
member.returns: How many laps were completed during this move (usually 0 or 1).

member.name: P:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.Track.LapProgressPercent
member.summary: Returns the current lap progress as a 0–100 percentage. Used by the progress bar in the UI.

member.name: M:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.Track.GetProgressBar(System.Int32)
member.summary: Builds a visual text progress bar like [=====> ] to show lap progress. This is the optional textual progress indicator from the spec.
member.param: How many characters wide the bar should be.

member.name: M:CSharpSpeedRush.Models.Track.ToString
member.summary: Returns a short summary like "Lap 2/5".

member.name: T:CSharpSpeedRush.Views.MainWindow
member.summary: Main window code-behind. Connects UI events to RaceManager.
MainWindow

member.name: F:CSharpSpeedRush.Views.MainWindow._raceManager
member.summary: The game logic engine. All rules live in here, not in this file.

member.name: M:CSharpSpeedRush.Views.MainWindow.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes window and car selection ComboBox.

member.name: M:CSharpSpeedRush.Views.MainWindow.StartButton_Click(System.Object,System.Windows.RoutedEventArgs)
member.summary: Called when the player clicks "START RACE". Grabs the selected car and tells the RaceManager to begin.

member.name: M:CSharpSpeedRush.Views.MainWindow.SpeedUpButton_Click(System.Object,System.Windows.RoutedEventArgs)
member.summary: Handles the "Speed Up" button click.

member.name: M:CSharpSpeedRush.Views.MainWindow.MaintainButton_Click(System.Object,System.Windows.RoutedEventArgs)
member.summary: Handles the "Maintain Speed" button click.

member.name: M:CSharpSpeedRush.Views.MainWindow.PitStopButton_Click(System.Object,System.Windows.RoutedEventArgs)
member.summary: Handles the "Pit Stop" button click.

member.name: M:CSharpSpeedRush.Views.MainWindow.RestartButton_Click(System.Object,System.Windows.RoutedEventArgs)
member.summary: Resets the game so the player can try again without restarting the app.

member.name: M:CSharpSpeedRush.Views.MainWindow.HandleAction(CSharpSpeedRush.Models.PlayerAction)
member.summary: Handles Speed Up, Maintain Speed, and Pit Stop. Calls RaceManager and updates UI.
member.param: The action chosen by the player.

member.name: M:CSharpSpeedRush.Views.MainWindow.RefreshUI
member.summary: Updates all labels and progress bars from RaceManager state.

member.name: M:CSharpSpeedRush.Views.MainWindow.HandleRaceEnd
member.summary: Handles race end: shows message and disables action buttons.

member.name: M:CSharpSpeedRush.Views.MainWindow.SetActionButtonsEnabled(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Enables or disables all action buttons.

member.name: M:CSharpSpeedRush.Views.MainWindow.CarComboBox_SelectionChanged(System.Object,System.Windows.Controls.SelectionChangedEventArgs)
member.summary: Updates status preview when car selection changes.

member.name: M:CSharpSpeedRush.Views.MainWindow.InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent
